untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of: (1) higher timeframe trend establishment with quantified thresholds; (2) pullback retracement percentage thresholds ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] not specified); (3) momentum weakening detection ('lower highs or lower lows') which requires multi-bar structure comparison not supported by available indicators; (4) precise entry on 'resumption of higher timeframe trend direction' requiring multi-timeframe analysis. The allowed indicator set lacks cross-timeframe analysis capabilities and specific retracement measurement tools. Key parameters pullback_retracement_min_pct and pullback_retracement_max_pct are undefined.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires multi-timeframe analysis (higher TF trend + lower TF pullback) and precise retracement measurements, which cannot be accurately translated using single-timeframe indicators. The approximation above uses SMA_50 as a trend proxy and RSI as momentum weakness indicator, but does not capture the core logic of countertrend pullback trading within a dominant trend framework.
